title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

title: OpenAI Node: Analyze Image only shows GPT-4o models, excludes newer vision-capable models
summary:
### Bug Description

The Analyze Image operation's model dropdown only shows models containing `vision` or `gpt-4o` in their ID. This is because `imageModelSearch` in `listSearch.ts` uses a stale whitelist filter:

```typescript
(model) => model.id.includes('vision') || model.id.includes('gpt-4o')
`

title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] feat: Route chat through OpenClaw Gateway (primary agent)
summary:
## Summary

Changes the `/api/chat` endpoint to try the **OpenClaw Gateway** (via WebSocket at `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`) as the primary agent before falling back to direct Ollama. Previously chat always went straight to Ollama.

**Backend (`server.js`):**
- Adds `ws` npm dependency for WebSocket clien

title: [PR] feat(core): initial automatic prompt optimization poc + batch queue
summary:
Add DPE prompt optimization (traces, slot profiles, artifacts, A/B resolver, auto-optimizer, BootstrapFewShot; GEPA/ACE stubs for Phase 4). Wire plugin-neuro for scoring and RUN_ENDED finalization. Introduce batch-queue utilities and integrate runtime, embedding, message, and action paths.

Also b

title: [PR] Phase 0: RadAI backend, Docker stack, and infrastructure

- **FastAPI backend** with full API routes (auth, studies, AI jobs, reports, voice dictation)

- **AI model integrations**: TotalSegmentator, nnInteractive, M

Closes https://github.com/openkaiden/kaiden/issues/1294
